title: Apple Takes Legal Action Against OpenAI Over Stolen Secrets
subtitle: A former engineer allegedly used a hidden software bug to download confidential data after joining the AI company.

summary.en: Apple has filed a lawsuit against OpenAI regarding the theft of sensitive trade secrets. The company claims a former engineer used a software bug to access private files after leaving his job. This legal action follows earlier accusations that OpenAI hired former Apple staff to gain an unfair advantage in hardware development. Apple is now seeking court orders to stop OpenAI from using this stolen information. The case highlights the growing competition between tech giants as they race to build new AI-powered devices.
summary.zh: 蘋果公司已針對敏感商業機密遭竊一事對 OpenAI 提起訴訟。蘋果聲稱一名離職工程師利用軟體漏洞存取私人檔案。此法律行動延續了先前關於 OpenAI 透過招募蘋果前員工以在硬體開發上獲取不公平競爭優勢的指控。蘋果目前正尋求法院禁制令，以阻止 OpenAI 使用這些竊取的資訊。此案凸顯了科技巨頭在競相開發人工智慧裝置時日益激烈的競爭關係。

paragraphs.en: Apple has officially taken legal action against OpenAI, accusing the AI company of stealing secret business information. This lawsuit, filed on Friday, claims that a former Apple engineer used a technical error to access private company data after he had already started working for OpenAI. This development follows earlier reports that Apple believes OpenAI is hiring its former employees to gain an unfair advantage, specifically to help them build new hardware that could compete with the iPhone.
paragraphs.zh: 蘋果公司（Apple）已正式對人工智慧公司 OpenAI 採取法律行動，指控該公司竊取商業機密資訊。這起於週五提出的訴訟聲稱，一名蘋果前工程師在跳槽至 OpenAI 後，利用一項技術錯誤存取了公司的私人資料。在此之前，已有報導指出蘋果認為 OpenAI 正在招募其前員工，藉此獲取不公平的競爭優勢，特別是為了協助他們開發能與 iPhone 競爭的新硬體設備。

paragraphs.en: According to Ars Technica, the problem began when a former Apple engineer, Chang Liu, left the company in January 2026 to join OpenAI. Even after leaving, Liu kept an Apple-issued work laptop that he should have returned. On February 9, Liu discovered a rare software bug—a mistake in the computer code that allows someone to do something they should not be able to do. This bug gave him access to Apple’s shared network folders, which contained sensitive information about future products and technical designs.
paragraphs.zh: 根據科技媒體 Ars Technica 報導，問題始於蘋果前工程師劉昌（Chang Liu，音譯）於 2026 年 1 月離職並加入 OpenAI。即便離職後，劉員仍保留了一台理應歸還的蘋果配發工作筆電。2 月 9 日，劉員發現了一個罕見的軟體漏洞，即電腦程式碼中允許使用者進行未授權操作的錯誤。該漏洞使他得以存取蘋果的共享網路資料夾，其中包含關於未來產品與技術設計的敏感資訊。

paragraphs.en: Apple claims that instead of reporting this mistake, Liu used it to download dozens of confidential files. These files included detailed information about unreleased hardware, engineering presentations, and project data. Apple noted that some of these files were clearly marked as secret. One specific document, which explained the design of complex circuit boards, was described by Apple as being extremely valuable to anyone trying to build new hardware devices.
paragraphs.zh: 蘋果指控劉員並未回報此錯誤，反而利用它下載了數十份機密檔案。這些檔案包含未發布硬體的詳細資訊、工程簡報以及專案資料。蘋果指出，其中部分檔案已明確標示為機密。其中一份解釋複雜電路板設計的文件，被蘋果形容為對任何試圖打造新硬體裝置的人而言，都極具價值。

paragraphs.en: In the lawsuit, Apple shared evidence of messages that Liu allegedly sent to a current Apple employee, Yu-Ting “Alyssa” Peng. In these messages, Liu mocked his former employer for the security mistake. He reportedly wrote, “I found out I can access the network storage, so funny.” Apple discovered these messages while investigating internal communications, which led them to uncover the security breach. The company confirmed that the bug was quickly fixed once they found the messages, and they believe no other users took advantage of the error to steal information.
paragraphs.zh: 在訴訟中，蘋果分享了劉員涉嫌傳送給現任蘋果員工彭郁婷（Yu-Ting “Alyssa” Peng，音譯）的訊息證據。在這些訊息中，劉員嘲笑前東家的安全疏失。據報導，他寫道：「我發現我可以存取網路儲存空間，真好笑。」蘋果在調查內部通訊時發現了這些訊息，進而揭露了這起安全漏洞。該公司證實，在發現這些訊息後，該漏洞已迅速修復，且他們認為沒有其他使用者利用該錯誤竊取資訊。

paragraphs.en: This legal battle is part of a larger conflict between the two tech companies. Apple argues that OpenAI is working on a plan to create AI-powered devices that would compete directly with Apple’s own products. By hiring former Apple engineers and allegedly taking their internal knowledge, Apple claims that OpenAI is trying to take an “unlawful shortcut” to success. The lawsuit asks the court for several injunctions—official orders from a judge that force a person or company to stop doing something—to prevent OpenAI from using any of the stolen information in its future projects.
paragraphs.zh: 這場法律戰是兩家科技巨頭之間更大衝突的一部分。蘋果主張，OpenAI 正計畫打造能與蘋果自家產品直接競爭的人工智慧裝置。蘋果指控，OpenAI 透過聘僱蘋果前工程師並涉嫌獲取其內部知識，試圖採取「不法的捷徑」來取得成功。該訴訟要求法院發布多項禁制令，即由法官下達要求個人或公司停止特定行為的正式命令，以防止 OpenAI 在未來的專案中使用任何被竊取的資訊。

paragraphs.en: This is not the first time Apple has raised concerns about its former staff moving to OpenAI. Earlier reports indicated that Apple had already accused the company of hiring away key talent to gain access to secret product designs. OpenAI has previously denied these claims, but this new lawsuit provides specific details about how the information was allegedly taken. The case is now in the hands of the courts, and it remains to be seen how these accusations will affect the future of both companies.
paragraphs.zh: 這並非蘋果首次對前員工跳槽至 OpenAI 表示擔憂。先前的報導指出，蘋果早已指控該公司挖角關鍵人才，以獲取機密產品設計。OpenAI 先前已否認這些指控，但這起新訴訟提供了關於資訊如何被竊取的具體細節。目前案件已進入司法程序，這些指控將如何影響兩家公司的未來，仍有待觀察。

paragraphs.en: For now, Apple is continuing its investigation into the extent of the data theft. The company is determined to protect its intellectual property, which refers to the ideas and designs that a company owns and uses to stay ahead of its competitors. As the race to develop the next generation of AI hardware continues, this case serves as a reminder of how important security is for large technology firms. The outcome of this lawsuit could set a significant example for how companies handle the movement of employees and the protection of trade secrets in the future.
paragraphs.zh: 目前，蘋果正持續調查資料外洩的程度。該公司決心保護其智慧財產權，即公司所擁有並用以保持競爭優勢的創意與設計。隨著開發下一代人工智慧硬體的競賽持續進行，此案提醒了大型科技公司安全防護的重要性。這起訴訟的結果，可能會為未來企業如何處理員工流動及保護商業機密，樹立重要的先例。

keyTerms.definitionEn: To use a situation or a mistake for one's own benefit, often in an unfair way.
keyTerms.definitionZh: 利用（某種情況或錯誤）來獲取利益，常帶有負面含義。
keyTerms.noteZh: 此片語在文中指利用系統漏洞獲取不當利益。文中：The company confirmed that the bug was quickly fixed once they found the messages, and they believe no other users took advantage of the error to steal information.

keyTerms.definitionEn: To persuade someone to leave their current job to work for your company instead.
keyTerms.definitionZh: 挖角，指說服某人離開現職轉而為自己公司工作。
keyTerms.noteZh: 由 hire（雇用）與 away（離開）組成，強調將人才從原公司帶走。文中：Earlier reports indicated that Apple had already accused the company of hiring away key talent to gain access to secret product designs.

keyTerms.definitionEn: To maintain a position of advantage or leadership compared to others.
keyTerms.noteZh: 這裡的 ahead 並非指物理距離，而是指競爭優勢。文中：The company is determined to protect its intellectual property, which refers to the ideas and designs that a company owns and uses to stay ahead of its competitors.

sources.name: Ars Technica
sources.title: Apple sues OpenAI after ex-engineer allegedly used bug to steal trade secrets

previousArticles.title: Apple Takes Legal Action Against OpenAI Over Stolen Secrets
previousArticles.summaryEn: Apple has filed a lawsuit against OpenAI, claiming the company stole trade secrets to build its own hardware. The legal action follows accusations that former Apple employees took sensitive information and product designs to their new jobs. OpenAI has denied the claims, stating they are focused on building innovative technology. This lawsuit marks a significant change in the relationship between the two companies, which previously worked together on AI integration. Apple is now seeking financial damages and a court order to stop OpenAI from using its private data.

quiz.question: What specific action did Chang Liu take after discovering the software bug on his Apple laptop?

options.A: He reported the security mistake to his former manager at Apple.
options.B: He used the bug to download multiple confidential files about unreleased hardware.
options.C: He immediately returned the laptop to Apple to avoid legal trouble.
options.D: He shared the bug's code with other OpenAI employees to help them build circuits.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。根據文章第三段，Liu 在發現軟體漏洞後，並沒有回報，而是利用該漏洞下載了數十份包含未發佈硬體、工程簡報等機密文件。選項 A 與事實相反，因為他並未回報；選項 C 錯誤，因為他保留了筆電；選項 D 雖然提到硬體，但文章並未指出他與其他 OpenAI 員工共享漏洞程式碼，僅提到他下載了文件。

quiz.question: What can be inferred about the relationship between Apple's security discovery and the internal messages?

options.A: Apple discovered the breach because they were specifically monitoring Liu's personal email.
options.B: The security bug was only identified after Apple began investigating communications involving current employees.
options.C: Yu-Ting Peng reported Liu to Apple management after receiving his mocking messages.
options.D: Apple had been aware of the data theft for months but waited to file the lawsuit.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。根據文章第四段，Apple 是在調查內部通訊時，發現了 Liu 傳給現任員工 Peng 的嘲諷訊息，才進而揭發了這起安全漏洞。選項 A 無法由文中得知，文中僅說調查內部通訊；選項 C 錯誤，文中未指出是 Peng 舉報；選項 D 與事實不符，文中未提到 Apple 早就知情並等待。

quiz.question: In the fifth paragraph, what does the phrase 'unlawful shortcut' imply about OpenAI's strategy?

options.A: OpenAI is trying to bypass standard legal and ethical procedures to gain a competitive edge.
options.B: OpenAI is developing new hardware faster than Apple by using more efficient manufacturing.
options.C: OpenAI is hiring engineers who are willing to work longer hours than those at Apple.
options.D: OpenAI is using a technical loophole to avoid paying taxes on their new AI devices.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 A。文中提到 OpenAI 透過聘請前 Apple 員工並獲取內部知識來取得「不合法的捷徑」（unlawful shortcut），意指他們藉由非法手段（竊取機密）來加速開發，而非透過正當研發。選項 B 錯誤，文中強調的是資訊竊取而非製造效率；選項 C 與員工工時無關；選項 D 則完全偏離文章討論的智慧財產權議題。

quiz.question: What is the primary focus of this article?

options.A: To explain the technical details of how software bugs compromise network security.
options.B: To highlight the personal conflict between Chang Liu and his former colleagues at Apple.
options.C: To discuss the history of hardware competition between Apple and OpenAI.
options.D: To report on Apple's legal action against OpenAI regarding allegations of intellectual property theft.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 D。整篇文章的核心在於報導 Apple 對 OpenAI 提起的訴訟，以及 Apple 對其前員工竊取商業機密與 OpenAI 試圖透過不正當手段獲取競爭優勢的指控。選項 A 僅是背景細節；選項 B 過於聚焦個人恩怨，忽略了公司間的法律爭端；選項 C 則過於籠統，未涵蓋本次訴訟的核心議題。
